race.description: Cruice Creations Qtis Three-Year-Old Mdn Hcp
race.comment: RACKETEER (4) has started once in Victoria for the former stable and well held heading back to the paddock. Has ventured north and presents on the back of two trials including a win and has the blinkers come off. Expected to measure up first try this area. OUR GIRL SCARLETT (8) placed at Eagle Farm fresh before finding one better on the Gold Coast last time. Overdue and shapes as one of the key chances. OVER SPRAY (2) was well in the market and ran a solid race on debut before another spell. Nice debut and expecting a positive return. LADY MILAN (7) is fitter for three runs in and is nearing a win. Moor booked and expected to run well.
